skillTree.localised_description: The turbulent Winds of Magic can do little harm to those who have found harmony amidst its raging currents.
The best way to repel the chaotic flurry of missile fire is to meet it with order, discipline, and a stalwart row of shields.
Who wants to live forever? As it turns out, most beings wouldn't say no…

effects.description: When normally killed in action, this Hero will be wounded instead

skillTree.localised_description: Having learned much in their long years of service, this character now turns their attention to training others.

effects.description: Character will share +10% of experience earned between all other active Heroes of the same type
Character will share +20% of experience earned between all other active Heroes of the same type
Character will share +30% of experience earned between all other active Heroes of the same type

skillTree.localised_description: "Never forget that we descend from Kamau himself, His will like the desert wind – unyielding, unseen, and unstoppable."
"The ways of the Great Chieftain demand that the hunt only ends with the kill – and not a moment sooner."

effects.description:
Vigour loss reduction: -15% for all Tiger Warrior units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: The intricate and mysterious rites of the Clawspeakers mend both broken lands and broken minds.
When an indomitable mind becomes one with the Winds, feats of battle both great and legendary are made manifest.

effects.description:
Spell resistance: 15% for all Tiger Warrior units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Whispering in chants of ancient Ind’s unwritten traditions, the Clawspeaker enters a state of consciousness allowing them to see the Winds in their purest form.
"Stay true to the battle. Others before you endured the same. Do not weaken!"

attributes.bullet_text: This unit can never have its Melee Attack reduced during battle.

skillTree.localised_description: The might of all Thousand Gods can be called down to the battlefield to anchor the souls of the noble Tigers.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.

effects.description:
Attribute: Immune to Psychology for all Tiger Warrior units
	(Hero's army)

related_attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

skillTree.localised_description: Kamau’s fabled esoteric knowledge of martial mysticism was said to have been gifted by the Thousand Gods, then shared to his worshippers via the Clawspeakers’ oral traditions.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve: +2 per turn
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +10

skillTree.localised_description: In hissed arcane melody, the Clawspeaker masterfully binds the Winds into a single, obedient stream.

effects.description: Cooldown: -15% to Lore of Beasts, Life, and Shadow spells
Winds of Magic cost: -1 for Lore of Beasts, Life, and Shadow spells

skillTree.localised_description: The Clawspeaker’s presence brings forth the robust aspect of Kamau, bestowing upon worshippers a divine steadfastness under hardship.

effects.description:
Attrition: -10% casualties suffered from Chaos attrition
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Through fervent supplication, a Clawspeaker may be rejuvenated in body, for he knows mental fortitude cannot overcome the body's failings.
The spellcaster unleashes the beast within, using its fury to transform allies into bestial forms.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -1 for "Wyssan's Wildform"
Winds of Magic cost: -1 for "Wyssan's Wildform Upgraded"
Miscast base chance: -15% for "Wyssan's Wildform Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: The spellcaster attunes the magic of the wild, channelling its ancient and arcane power.
With a mighty bellow, the caster invokes Corvus the Crow Lord, summoning his servants to peck at the foe's eyes.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -1 for "Flock of Doom"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Flock of Doom Upgraded"
Miscast base chance: -15% for "Flock of Doom Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: Calling upon the beast spirits of the wild, the caster sheathes vulnerable flesh in unyielding fur and hide.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -1 for "Pann's Impenetrable Pelt"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Pann's Impenetrable Pelt Upgraded"
Miscast base chance: -15% for "Pann's Impenetrable Pelt Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: Sounding a gnarled horn, the caster summons a glowing amber spear and hurls it at the foe with uncanny accuracy.

ui_effects.localised_text: Strong vs single and multiple units
Requires line of sight to the target
Strong vs single and multiple units
Requires line of sight to the target
Strong vs single and multiple units
Requires line of sight to the target

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "The Amber Spear"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "The Amber Spear Upgraded"
Miscast base chance: -15% for "The Amber Spear Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: Nebulous nature spirits assail the foe, clawing at them with hands not nearly as insubstantial as they appear.

effects.description: Overcast spell: "The Curse of Anraheir Upgraded"
Overcast spell: "The Curse of Anraheir Upgraded"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "The Curse of Anraheir"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "The Curse of Anraheir Upgraded"
Miscast base chance: -15% for "The Curse of Anraheir Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: Kadon, a master of forms, was able to shift his shape into anything he chose. This mastery is used to summon a Celestial Lion, as if Kadon himself fights for you.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Transformation of Kadon"

skillTree.localised_description: By stabbing a staff or some arcane conduit into the ground, an accomplished magic-user can earth or tether the Winds and hopefully reduce a chance of miscasting.
A few magic-users have the ability to store the Winds of Magic for later use, increasing their spellcasting power when it really counts.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve: +1 per turn
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +5

skillTree.localised_description: Those in the army can find succour or be replenished by the power of this champion.

effects.description: Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 3%
Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 6%
Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 9%

skillTree.localised_description: The sight of a powerful figure extolling death and blasphemies can bring enemy ranks to their knees.

effects.description: Hinder Replenishment action: Replenishment is modified by an additional -10%
Hinder Replenishment action: Replenishment is modified by an additional -20%
Hinder Replenishment action: Replenishment is modified by an additional -40%

skillTree.localised_description: They cannot stop what they cannot see.

effects.description: Damage Walls action: 1 additional wall breaches
Damage Walls action: 2 additional wall breaches
Damage Walls action: 3 additional wall breaches

skillTree.localised_description: Such a champion will not bend or break, but slay in their Lord's name.

effects.description: Wound action: Additional 5% chance of wounding target
Wound action: Additional 15% chance of wounding target
Wound action: Additional 30% chance of wounding target

skillTree.localised_description: The locals take notice and will be inspired or frightened into action.

effects.description: Cleanse Corruption action: Corruption is reduced by an additional 2
Cleanse Corruption action: Corruption is reduced by an additional 4
Cleanse Corruption action: Corruption is reduced by an additional 6

skillTree.localised_description: An expert in their craft, this Hero knows all the mistakes that can be made and how to best avoid making them.

attributes.bullet_text: This unit provides a leadership bonus to nearby allies. Units within range of both the Lord's aura and an encouraging unit will receive the larger of the two bonuses.
This unit can hide in forests until enemy units get too close.

A Tiger Warrior unit has:
	 ➕ Increased  Speed
	 ➕ Increased  Charge Bonus
	 ➕ Ferocious Ambush ability

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Patience may be a virtue, but some simply cannot afford to wait.

effects.description:
Ambush success chance: +5%
	(armies in local owned region)

attributes.bullet_text: Entities with this attribute double their charge bonus when attacking the rear or flank of an entity.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Despite their stark animalistic appearance, Tiger Warriors are far from savages, and loath those of that ilk.
No being can kill what it cannot catch.

related_attributes.bullet_text: Speed and combat penalties caused by terrain are ignored by this unit.

attributes.bullet_text: Speed and combat penalties caused by terrain are ignored by this unit.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: "When the tranquillity of calm isn't enough, do not unleash your inner beast – embrace it."

enabled_if: Leadership is higher than 50% of base

attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

effects.description: Hero self-defence: +10% chance of wounding aggressors

backgroundSkills.localised_description: If knowledge is power, then this one is powerful indeed.

effects.description: Magic item drop chance from battle: +15%

backgroundSkills.localised_description: When the arrows are spent and the blades are all blunted, this perfect warrior can rely on their well-trained body to keep death from their door.
The unseen predator is not always the only one to catch their prey, but they are often the first.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can move hidden in any terrain.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: "The trick is to think two steps ahead… and then think one step ahead of that."

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: This one could challenge an Ogre to an arm-wrestling match.
Sometimes, a calm and measured approach is required to achieve success.

effects.description: Magic item drop chance from battle: +15%

backgroundSkills.localised_description: A dashing scar completes any true warrior's look.
